raw_input:
[5.0/5] Great serum that really works! We are all searching for the fountain of youth! Okay I don't want to look old and wrinkled! The description very much interested me so I decided I was ready to try it here!! I've never tried anything from the dead sea and when I read that the product was made within a few miles of the Dead Sea, with no mineral degradation during transport. I was anxious to give it a try. I try all sorts of things to keep that youthful glow of the skin but I also am selective about what I apply to my skin. Everything was natural here though, and It is not tested on animals, contains NO Alcohol, Sulfate or Parabens and is non- toxic.

The product came in a 1.1 fluid ounce moisturizing serum. This product contains Glycerin and essential Dead Sea Minerals, known for their exceptional hydroscopic attributes and as a source of beautifying minerals. I read that in the description and thought what in the world is hydroscopic...so I looked it up. "Hygroscopy (etymology and pronunciation) is the ability of a substance to attract and hold water molecules from the surrounding environment. This is achieved through either absorption or adsorption with the absorbing or adsorbing substance becoming physically changed somewhat." They perform synergistically (which means together with) Squalane, Dunaliella Salina Extract, Jojoba Seed Oil and Wheat Protein to help increase the skin's moister levels and diminish water loss for a more vital and glowing overall look. After reading that in the description and researching what some of the terms meant, I decided to put the product to the test. I have aging sking that is somewhat problematic with large pores and a few minor areas of sagging skin. I read clearly in the description that Genesea Perfecting Serum helps to disapate the signs of skin aging such as fine lines, wrinkles and sagginess and that you would see effects of the serum in five minutes.

I've been using the serum for a good while now sometimes under makeup and every night before going to bed at night on clean dry skin. The serum is of excellent quality with no redness, burning itching or negative side effects. It doesn't react against or burn the skin. I don't have a problem with it leaving my face greasy or shiny and it quickly absorbs into the skin within just a couple of minutes. I notice an immediate firming and suppleness of the skin but no discomfort or a feeling of being too taut. There is no build up or product residue left on the skin at all. This product has a nice smell, light and kind of floral smelling, but no bad smell at all. It is quite easy to use with an pump dispenser for the serum. I always prefer a pump dispenser as it keeps the integrity of the product by keeping air and contaminants out. A little of the serum goes a long way, and the product is lasting a good long time.

This product really hydrates my skin and make it look nice and firm almost immediately. This serum really works and is reducing wrinkles and fine lines I have starting in my skin. The skin on my face looks so much more supple. It also seems to keep down oiliness and shine off my face. My skin also looks clearer with less break outs and skin problems. I use the serum on clean skin of the face and I let it soak in. I also add the serum all over my face, and under the the throat and jaw line for added firmness and last I add a good moisturizing cream. While I am applying my eye makeup, I let the serums and cream soak in. The face serum contains ingredient that keep your skin smooth and moisturized.

It seems to me that the manufacturers of the product have researched and thought out the effects of this product and have provided a great combination of products to promote beautiful skin. So far no complaints or problems and all the products I've tried appear to be working very well for me. [5.0/5] Awesome product. I will definitely purchase again Awesome product. I will definitely purchase again! [5.0/5] ... serum feels so silky on your face I just love it, I have only had it for a ... "This serum feels so silky on your face I just love it, I have only had it for a
few days and I swear I see a difference in my skin. The smell of the serum is
very soft, I would highly recommend this to anyone wanting glowing skin." [1.0/5] How to get the serum to come out of its tube? It seems to be too thick to come out. I need help here. Gloria Orenstein I cannot review it because the serum will not come out of this tube. I have been trying to push on the top to get it to come out of the spout and it doesn't come out. Do you have any suggestions? I feel maybe it needs to be warmed up---maybe it has to become more liquid to pour out. What do you think. I got one dot out and it was as thick cream, and I figure it is stuck in there. What can I do to get it to come out? I am using the mineral cream but I wanted to do the two together, and I am having no luck at getting the serum to come out. Please advise me. G. Orenstein [5.0/5] Premium, powerful, natural ingredients that you won't find in other serums Pros:
+ Natural ingredients sourced and imported from the Dead Sea
+ One of the few serums that contains Dunaliella salina
+ Botanical squalane, jojoba, wheat derived amino acids
+ Highly effective formula softens and smooths dry patches immediately
+ No chemicals, toxins, or pore clogging fillers
+ No palm oil
+ Efficient 1.1 ounce pump top container
+ Trusted brand / Family friendly ingredients
Cons:
- None
This is the best age fighting serum on the market. You only need a dime sized application for full coverage so the 1.1 ounce container should last. It's nearly impossible to find moisturizers or serums like Genesea's that include Dunaliella salina... a micro algae that survives in salt by producing massive amounts of carotenoids. Dunaliella salina is a natural anti ageing powerhouse and a weapon against oxidation and free radical formation. Highly recommended
< Discount provided for evaluation and review [5.0/5] Felt skin tighten with first use I guess I might be the first to review this product without getting a discount to review it. Well, first time I put it on and felt tightening of the skin around my eyes the first use. I agree with the other reviewers that you don't need a lot. Just some small dots. This is my first use and will update later if things change or I notice anything dramatic again. So far, I'm impressed. [4.0/5] Nice light serum I'm torn on how to review another Genesea product. I have purchased three different products from this company and the quality seems to very different on all of them. This serum is pretty good. I like that it goes on very smooth and doesn't leave my face feeling greasy. It is light enough to use under make up but I generally don't because I like my daily moisturizer to have some sunscreen in it. The smell on this product is much better than the last product I purchased. There is a scent to it but it is not overpowering and seems to fade as the serum soaks into my skin. This serum has glycerin in it which I have had issues with in the past but so far I haven't had any reactions or sensitivity. I'm not sure that I have noticed any reduction in lines on my face, but I haven't used this consistently on a daily basis yet so maybe I will. Generally I am much happier with this serum than I thought I would be after my last purchase was so disappointing. I do have to say their jojoba serum is still my favorite but this one is a close second. [5.0/5] Your skin will feel pampered! I love this! This product feels so nice on my face. I've reviewed several facial product, and this one is a top line product. This cream makes my face feel soft and smooth. This fades away the wrinkles and helps reduce any puffiness under the eyes. I can't say enough good about this serum. It will amaze you. I have a friend who had huge bags under her eyes, well, to quote her, "they aren't bags, they're pillows". I've been sharing this with her, and the results are amazing, the bags (or as she would say, pillows) are gone. She's looks at least 10 years younger. I've had similar comments directed towards me, but it's easier to see results in someone else. If you want to reverse or slow down the effects of aging, I would really recommend you try this product. If for nothing else, your face will feel pampered and that's an overall great feeling. I was lucky enough to receive this at a discount in exchange for an honest and unbiased review. [3.0/5] Three Stars Not convinced.. Has a smell of a cheap soap and not even sure if it did anything. [5.0/5] Five Stars very good product and will keep use it [5.0/5] I love the Facial Perfecting Serum I love the Facial Perfecting Serum! I really do see a difference and I will continue to use this product as long as it is available to me. It's amazing!! Try it. You will love it, too. I recently had a problem with one of my reorders with the pump not working on the Facial Perfecting Serum. I didn't return it but had to unscrew the pump each evening. I mentioned it in a review and Genesea immediately took care of the problem for me. They really do care about their customers and, quite obviously, stand behind their product. I really do love the serum and night cream and, if you haven't tried it, I sincerely hope you do. I do love it and I bet you will, too! [5.0/5] ... morning & it makes my face feel fresh and like new. A good quality product I use the serum every morning & it makes my face feel fresh and like new. A good quality product. [5.0/5] I'm Loving it - the Younger Looking Better Me! As with most women I am always looking for a serum that will hydrate my face and make me more youthful looking. My sister swore I would love this one and because I'm five years older, I look at what's working - or not working - with her. Obviously what was working with her I needed. I bought my own because I feel you have to try it for at least a week to know if it's working. I became an advocate for Genesea Perfecting Serum when I saw a difference in just one use (imaging how I will look with 2 weeks use!). I didn't feel like I had taken an oil bath, nor had I coated my face in parabens or wax. Going outside I. The summer heat didn't leave me wiping off before it slid off. Instead I felt refreshed! [5.0/5] Great serum I love this serum. It's not greasy at all and it really seems to moisturize my face without leaving it sticky. I mostly hate all face creams but this one is great. I also love the smell! [5.0/5] Keeper I use this each morning before I put on make up. Smooth finish, lots of compliments daily on my skin. Worth every penny--- this is a keeper [5.0/5] I love it! Does what it says! I have been using this lift serum for a couple of years now. I use it daily and I love the results. [5.0/5] Good product! Just one time and I could see the difference. I shall for sure do the 30 days and watch the changes.
I also use the night cream. I plan on getting the day cream and eye cream also.
Good product!! Thank you. [5.0/5] Fantastic product! It does what it says, my skin feels firmer after only a weeks use and my pores are smaller. Will definitely buy again! [2.0/5] Serum too drying for mature skin I only used the product once because it dried out my face and left it flaly. I even used a moisturize after I applied the serum per the directions, but my face was so dried out that it did not help. It took 3 days for my face to get back to normal.

response:
Most reviewers love serum. Skin feel firm, soft, young-looking fast. Many see difference first use. Natural ingredients from Dead Sea - no alcohol, sulfate, parabens, toxins. Contain Dunaliella salina, jojoba, squalane, wheat protein, glycerin. Work good under makeup. Little bit go long way. Pump dispenser keep product fresh. Smell light, floral, not bad.

Bad reviews few. One cave-person serum not come out of tube - stuck, too thick. One cave-person skin dry out bad, flaky, take 3 days recover. One cave-person not convinced - smell like cheap soap, no results seen.

Most say buy again. Company fix problems fast when customer complain. Many get discount for review.
